name: SIFCO INDUSTRIES INC
summary: SIFCO Industries, Inc. is an Ohio-based manufacturer of forgings, machined components, and sub-assemblies primarily for Aerospace & Energy markets. Operating from Cleveland, OH and Orange, CA, SIFCO produces OEM and aftermarket components for aircraft gas turbine engines, steam turbine blades, landing gear, helicopter rotors, and structural airframe parts using steel, titanium, nickel alloys, and aluminum. In October 2024, the Company sold its Italian subsidiary CBlade to streamline operations and refocus on core aerospace forging.

products.name: OEM and aftermarket aircraft gas turbine engine components
products.description: Forged and machined components for aircraft and industrial gas turbine engines.

products.name: Steam turbine blades
products.description: Forged steam turbine blades for the energy sector.

products.name: Structural airframe components
products.description: Forged structural components for aircraft airframes.

products.name: Aircraft landing gear components
products.description: Forged and machined components for aircraft landing gear systems.

products.name: Aircraft wheels and brakes
products.description: Forged components for aircraft wheel and brake assemblies.

products.name: Critical rotating components for helicopters
products.description: Precision forgings for critical rotating helicopter parts.

products.name: Commercial and industrial products
products.description: Forgings and machined components for commercial and industrial applications.

products.name: Heat-treatment and surface-treatment services
products.description: Heat-treating, chemical/surface-treatment, and non-destructive testing of forged components.

products.name: Sub-assemblies
products.description: Assembled forged and machined sub-components for aerospace and energy customers.

partnerships.description: Supplies forged components for Boeing commercial aircraft programs including 787, 737 MAX, and 777-9.
Supplies forged components for Airbus programs including A320neo and A350.
